title: Salma' #8007
definition:
Salma = "garment"

 1) father of Boaz, father-in-law of Ruth, and grandfather of David
    1a) also 'Salmon', 'Salmah'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Salma = "garment"

 1) father of Boaz, father-in-law of Ruth, and grandfather of David
    1a) also 'Salmon', 'Salmah'

    NASB:  father of Boaz, same as 8012, also the founder of Bethlehem
